title: IL-17A stimulated C57BL/6 tail keratinocytes
author: Zhang, He
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset contains bulk RNA-seq data from IL-17A stimulated C57BL/6 mouse tail keratinocytes. 
 Dataset: 8177-JM Samples: 6 biological replicates (samples 7-12) 
 Sequencing: Paired-end RNA-seq 
 Files: 12 FASTQ files compressed with Genozip 
 File naming convention: - 8177-JM-{sample}_S{number}_R{read}_001.fastq.genozip 
 To decompress files:  
 
 Install Genozip: https://genozip.com/installing 
 Run: genounzip filename.fastq.genozip  
 Output: filename.fastq.gz (standard gzip format) Genozip provides 2-5x better compression than standard gzip while maintaining lossless compression. 
 
 Citation for Genozip: Lan, D., et al. (2021) Genozip: a universal extensible genomic data compressor, Bioinformatics, 37, 2225-2230, doi: https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btab102
steps_raw:
This dataset contains bulk RNA-seq data from IL-17A stimulated C57BL/6 mouse tail keratinocytes. 
 Dataset: 8177-JM Samples: 6 biological replicates (samples 7-12) 
 Sequencing: Paired-end RNA-seq 
 Files: 12 FASTQ files compressed with Genozip 
 File naming convention: - 8177-JM-{sample}_S{number}_R{read}_001.fastq.genozip 
 To decompress files:  
 
 Install Genozip: https://genozip.com/installing 
 Run: genounzip filename.fastq.genozip  
 Output: filename.fastq.gz (standard gzip format) Genozip provides 2-5x better compression than standard gzip while maintaining lossless compression. 
 
 Citation for Genozip: Lan, D., et al. (2021) Genozip: a universal extensible genomic data compressor, Bioinformatics, 37, 2225-2230, doi: https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btab102
